title: 'Not unlike tariffs': Iran war threatens to deepen Asia private equity's worst fundraising slump in a decade
summary_full: The Middle East war has introduced a new layer of uncertainty for Asia-focused private equity managers already navigating a multiyear fundraising slump.
summary_public: The Middle East war has introduced a new layer of uncertainty for Asia-focused private equity managers already navigating a multiyear fundraising slump.
